description: EN-007 compliance capture hook (P3). Wires scripts/compliance-checkout.mjs to run at an agent run's start, claim an MC task, and stamp the PR body with 'MC-Checkout: <id>' so the gate resolves the agent + task. DISABLED by default (operator-local tooling; governance: ships disabled, opt-in). To enable: merge this entry into .cursor/hooks.json and set COMPLIANCE_CAPTURE=1 plus MC_BASE_URL / MC_TASK_ID / MC_ACCOUNTABLE / MC_REPO in the run env.
